name: Uxinzelelo lwesifuba seNaliti (NCD)
description: Uncedo olungxamisekileyo lwe-tension pneumothorax ngokufaka inaliti kwindawo yesibini ye-intercostal. Ungenelelo olusindisa ubomi.
steps: Chonga i-tension pneumothorax: ukungabikho kwezandi zokuphefumula kwicala elichaphazelekayo, ukuphambuka koqhoqhoqho (kade), uxinzelelo lokuphefumula, i-hypotension, i-JVD.
Fumana indawo ye-2 ye-intercostal, umgca we-midclavicular (enye: 4th / 5th ICS, umgca we-axillary wangaphambili).
Faka i-14g, i-3.25-inch inaliti-catheter perpendicular to the chest wall, nje ngaphaya kwe-TOP ye-3rd rib (ukuphepha i-neurovascular bundle).
Dlulela phambili de kuvakala ukungxola komoya okanye ukufutha okuvakalayo.
Susa inaliti kwaye ushiye i-catheter endaweni.
Mamela ukuphuculwa kwezandi zokuphefumula kunye nomzamo wokuphefumla.
Khusela ihabhu yecatheter. UNGAQINISEKI okanye uvale isiphelo esivulekileyo.
Phinda uphonononge yonke imizuzu emi-5-- i-catheter inokukink okanye ihlwili, ifuna ukuphinda uxinezeleke.
warnings: Sebenzisa inaliti eyi-3.25-intshi -- umgangatho we-14g angiocatheter (1.5in) isoloko isilela kwizigulana zasemkhosini ngenxa yesikrweqe somzimba kunye nezihlunu.
I-NCD yamacala omabini inokufunwa ukuba akuqinisekanga ukuba leliphi na icala elichaphazelekayo kwaye isigulane sibanjwe ngamathuba athile.
Musa ukubeka kwicala elinye nenxeba lokufunxa esifubeni ngaphandle kokuvala inxeba kuqala.

pediatric.note: Sebenzisa inaliti yobungakanani ngokufanelekileyo (izigulane ezincinci, i-1.5-2in inokwanela). Sebenzisa indlela ye-2 ye-ICS MCL. Ukuqondwa kophawu lomhlaba kunzima kakhulu -- sebenzisa isilumkiso.
